reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the decorative sway and drive platform travel through a separate movement component.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_moving_platform_2f_4fps_48x16.png through AssetServer and reuse the two-frame atlas for every platform instance.
runtime_notes: The platform moves horizontally in a deterministic 80 px range while the sprite remains centered on its collider.
Travel speed is 60 px per second and animation cadence is independent from motion.
Top surface height stays constant so friction transitions feel readable.

context.usage: Short rescue platform that carries the player across narrow gaps while descent remains continuous.

shape.silhouette: Stone platform with moss trim, side anchors, and a subtle sway in the hanging growth.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 96x16 px with two 48x16 frames.
Platform top surface stays flat across both frames so the player silhouette never looks unstable.
Moss sway shifts no more than 1 px between frames.
